options.content:
## Access Analytics

即時門禁熱點、考勤趨勢（平均工時 / 遲到率）、反潛回異常告警。

| 資料源 | 用途 |
|--------|------|
| ClickHouse | 門禁流量、考勤 |
| Prometheus | `report_passback_deny_1m_max` 告警 |

遲到定義：當日第一筆 ALLOW IN 晚於 **09:00 UTC**。

panels.title: 即時熱點圖 — 各門刷卡量（近 1 小時）

targets.rawSql: SELECT if(d.name = '', toString(e.door_id), d.name) AS door, count() AS swipes FROM access_control.inout_events AS e LEFT JOIN access_control.door AS d ON e.door_id = d.id WHERE e.event_time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR GROUP BY door ORDER BY swipes DESC

panels.title: 反潛回異常（近 1 分鐘最高門禁次數）
考勤統計 — 平均工時（本月每日）

targets.rawSql: SELECT toDateTime(day) AS time, avg(daily_hours) AS avg_hours FROM ( SELECT employee_id, toDate(event_time) AS day, multiIf( minIf(event_time, direction = 'IN') > toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC') AND maxIf(event_time, direction = 'OUT') > toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC'), dateDiff('second', minIf(event_time, direction = 'IN'), maxIf(event_time, direction = 'OUT')) / 3600.0, NULL ) AS daily_hours FROM access_control.inout_events WHERE status = 'ALLOW' AND event_time >= toStartOfMonth(today()) GROUP BY employee_id, day ) GROUP BY day ORDER BY time

panels.title: 考勤統計 — 遲到率（本月每日）

targets.rawSql: SELECT toDateTime(day) AS time, if(headcount > 0, late_count / headcount, 0) AS late_rate FROM ( SELECT day, count() AS headcount, sum(is_late) AS late_count FROM ( SELECT employee_id, toDate(event_time) AS day, if( minIf(event_time, direction = 'IN' AND status = 'ALLOW') > toDateTime64(concat(toString(toDate(event_time)), ' 09:00:00'), 3, 'UTC'), 1, 0 ) AS is_late FROM access_control.inout_events WHERE status = 'ALLOW' AND event_time >= toStartOfMonth(today()) GROUP BY employee_id, day ) GROUP BY day ) ORDER BY time

panels.title: 各門反潛回 DENY（Prometheus / 每 15s 輪詢 ClickHouse）
